title: orthosiphon marmoritis
intro: Orthosiphon marmoritis, also known as Cat's Whiskers or Lion's Tail, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique foliage and red or purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Orthosiphon marmoritis include reducing urinary tract infections, alleviating symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia, and lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Orthosiphon marmoritis plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
